detail: Applied claim adjudication to all P0/P1 findings across iterations 1-9. R3-P0-001 downgraded P0→P1 (documentation gap, not security/data-loss blocker). R1-P1-006, R1-P1-008, R4-P1-001, R4-P1-003, R4-P1-005, R5-P1-003, R6-P1-005 downgraded P1→P2 on evidence review. Evidence verified at source for all 37 adjudicated findings. 6 duplicate clusters identified for registry merge.

rationale: Unchecked checklist items are a documentation/traceability gap, not an exploitable security issue or data loss. P0 requires security/auth/data-loss per review_core.md §2. Implementation exists on disk; checklist was never maintained as living document.
graph-metadata.json:220 confirmed null. REQ-P-002 explicitly requires set value. Real gap, not false positive.
Metadata staleness confirmed. Status disagreement between spec and graph-metadata.
Three-way contradiction (title COMPLETE, body PARTIAL ~30%, frontmatter completion_pct 99) confirmed at source.
Checklist items confirmed unchecked. Merge with R6-P1-001.
description.json:2 confirmed missing /001-initial-doctor-commands suffix.
Stale resource-map status is documentation drift, not correctness/security blocker. Already captured as R9-P2-001.
Unchecked checklist confirmed. Merge with R3-P0-001 (now P1) and R6-P1-002.
Stale resource-map status is documentation drift. Already captured as R9-P2-002.
Duplicate of R1-P1-001. Same evidence, same root cause.
Phase map claims Complete vs child IMS PARTIAL confirmed at spec.md:104.
Duplicate of R1-P1-003. IMS ~30% vs files on disk.
tasks.md stale status confirmed; implementation files exist.
21 yamls claim vs 5 on disk, ADR-010 design documented.
Obsolete YAML mode references confirmed. Merge with R3-P1-004.
SC-001 25 vs actual 23 confirmed per ADR-008.
IMS completion_pct 70 vs body COMPLETE ~95% confirmed at source.
Duplicate of R1-P1-003. IMS internal contradiction.
Duplicate of R2-P1-006. Obsolete YAML mode references.
002 spec claims 001 Complete, contradicts 001 IMS.
Zero scenarios executed end-to-end; handover confirms. Critical verification gap.
rm -rf inside flock-protected section (line 205 flock acquired before line 287 rm). TOCTOU window effectively zero. Original confidence 0.80.
--no-audit deliberately suppresses dependency vulnerability scanning. Legitimate supply-chain concern.
pip install -e from local repo path, not external download. Same trust model as any repo script. Original confidence 0.70.
mkdir lock before flock confirmed; two concurrent sessions could race into npm install.
migration-manifest.json is local VC-controlled file. Schema validation is good practice but not a security P1. Original confidence 0.70.
Broad rw root mount reduces sandbox isolation. Legitimate container security concern.
Missing capability drops is standard sandbox hardening gap.
Env var set by operator in local sandbox. No external attacker vector. Allowlist is belt-and-suspenders.
Duplicate of R1-P1-004. 001 checklist unchecked.
Duplicate of R1-P1-007 / R3-P0-001 (now P1). 002 checklist 96% unchecked.
Spec says 10 YAMLs, disk has 5. Spec-code mismatch confirmed.
REQ-003 strict validate never passes. Known cross-packet issue but still spec violation.
POST-SAVE review is documentation process, not functional requirement. Metadata files exist and are valid.
skill_agent traceability gap confirmed. No SKILL.md ownership for doctor commands.
Cross-runtime command mirror missing for 3/4 runtimes confirmed.
handover.md:100 falsely claims last_active_child_id set; graph-metadata.json:220 is null. Doc-code drift confirmed.

evidence: Verified 8/8 P0 reqs in 001 and 12/12 in 002 have impl files. Gaps: REQ-002 YAML count (R6-P1-003), REQ-003 validate never passed (R6-P1-004).
001: 0/80+ checked. 002: 3/75+ checked. Evidence exists on disk for most items but never linked.
Doctor commands exist but lack SKILL.md ownership (R7-P1-001).
Agent mirrors clean. Command mirrors fail for 3/4 runtimes (R8-P1-001).
Resource-map entries stale for 001/002 (R1-P1-006, R1-P1-008 → P2). Most paths verified on disk.
23 scenarios structurally correct; zero executed end-to-end (R3-P1-006).

rationale: Adversarial self-check complete. R3-P0-001 downgraded P0→P1 (documentation gap). 7 P1 findings downgraded to P2 on evidence review. 0 P0, 30 P1 remain — all are documentation/traceability/correctness issues, not security exploits. Implementation code exists on disk and is structurally sound. Remediably without architectural rework.
